headline: Adobe’s MLB Deal Puts AI Tools To The Test At Scale
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS: ADBE) and Major League Baseball announced a multi year expansion of their partnership to deepen digital fan engagement. Adobe will become the official Presenting Sponsor of MLB Opening Day through 2028. MLB will integrate Adobe's AI enabled creative and marketing tools to deliver personalized content and campaigns across digital channels. For investors watching Adobe at a share price of $254.2, this MLB agreement adds a high profile client relationship at a time when the...

headline: Adobe to offer users free services $75 million over hard-to-cancel subscription mess
summary: Adobe will provide $75 million in free services and pay a $75 million penalty to settle allegations that its subscriptions were too difficult to cancel. The post Adobe to offer users free services $75 million over hard-to-cancel subscription mess appeared first on Digital Trends.

headline: AI Integration and Capabilities Power Adobe Inc. (ADBE) to Record First Quarter
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the best metaverse stocks to buy, according to analysts. On March 12, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) delivered record first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, as recurring revenue more than tripled and subscription revenue grew 13%. The better-than-expected results came as the company accelerated AI-powered capabilities across creativity, productivity, and customer experience orchestration. […]
